system_voice.tone: calm adult, data-grounded, no praise inflation
system_voice.feedback: direct forward (→), never alarm (✗). Factual, not motivational.
system_voice.empty_states: factual and actionable, no guilt or prodding
system_voice.absence: met with continuity, not commentary. 'Continuing.' not 'Welcome back!'
system_voice.metrics: every number defensible, compared to baseline not theoretical max

learner.name: Jason
learner.notes: Low-affinity material must always be embedded in interesting contexts.
